list.name: profile_id
list.label: profile_id
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM v05_reconciliation_measurement_day ORDER BY profile_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM v05_reconciliation_measurement_day ORDER BY profile_id

list.name: scenario_name
list.label: scenario
list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS scenario_name UNION SELECT DISTINCT scenario_name FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' ORDER BY scenario_name
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS scenario_name UNION SELECT DISTINCT scenario_name FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' ORDER BY scenario_name

title: v0.5 Measurement Semantic Risk Action Flow

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(a.target_date) time_sec,a.reconciliation_gap_score value,CONCAT(a.scenario_name,' reconciliation') metric FROM reliability_analysis_result_day_v05 a WHERE a.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(a.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR a.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(a.target_date),a.distortion_score,CONCAT(a.scenario_name,' distortion') FROM reliability_analysis_result_day_v05 a WHERE a.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(a.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR a.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(a.target_date),a.transaction_loss_score,CONCAT(a.scenario_name,' tx_loss') FROM reliability_analysis_result_day_v05 a WHERE a.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(a.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR a.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(a.target_date),COALESCE(a.runtime_evidence_score,0),CONCAT(a.scenario_name,' runtime') FROM reliability_analysis_result_day_v05 a WHERE a.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(a.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR a.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') ORDER BY 1

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.target_date) time_sec,u.semantic_base_score value,CONCAT(u.scenario_name,' semantic') metric FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 u WHERE u.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(u.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR u.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.target_date),u.reconciliation_gap_weight,CONCAT(u.scenario_name,' recon_weight') FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 u WHERE u.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(u.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR u.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.target_date),COALESCE(u.runtime_evidence_weight,0),CONCAT(u.scenario_name,' runtime_weight') FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 u WHERE u.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(u.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR u.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.target_date),u.overall_risk_score,CONCAT(u.scenario_name,' overall') FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 u WHERE u.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(u.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR u.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') ORDER BY 1

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(s.target_date)) time_sec,COUNT(*) value,COALESCE(s.dominant_semantic_risk,'None') metric FROM semantic_interpretation_day_v05 s WHERE s.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(s.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR s.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') GROUP BY COALESCE(s.dominant_semantic_risk,'None')

SELECT target_date,scenario_name,run_id,action_rank,action_type,recommended_action,evidence_table,evidence_metric,evidence_value FROM action_recommendation_day_v05 a WHERE a.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(a.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR a.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') ORDER BY target_date DESC,run_id DESC,action_rank LIMIT 100
